note: Provider submodule of fontyourface; import needs a Typekit token + SSL to Typekit.com, so cases are recipe (response-graded).

evals.prompt: How do you configure Typekit/Adobe font import in Drupal's @font-your-face and where is the credential stored?
evals.expected_output: Enter a Typekit API token on the @font-your-face settings form (/admin/appearance/font/settings); it is stored in typekit_api.settings:token. The server must reach Typekit.com over SSL.

evals.prompt: What provider id do Typekit fonts use in fontyourface, and what hook imports them?
evals.expected_output: pid typekit_api; hook_fontyourface_import() imports the kit fonts as font entities.
